summary: Analysis of the Voice and Accountability indicator reveals significant variation across countries and regions. methodology, components, global distribution. Research shows correlations with economic development, institutional quality, and political stability.
key_points: Analytical framework for understanding Voice and Accountability indicator
sources: Kaufmann, Kraay, Mastruzzi (2010) WGI Methodology Paper
Freedom House Freedom in the World
philosophy_guard: PASS - Describes what IS: measurable governance indicators and empirical patterns. No normative claims about what OUGHT to be.
